figures.label: Figure 6
figures.caption: Figure 6: We exclude models based on three criteria: $( i )$ the model has a large parameter size, leading to excessive latency during inference; $( i i )$ the model is not zero-shot and thus ineffective on arbitrary audio inputs; $( i i i )$ the audio generated by the model is low-quality.

figures.label: Figure 7
figures.caption: Figure 7: MFCC feature distributions of the original and adversarial audios generated by four methods. We use kernel density estimation (KDE) to calculate the distribution, with the horizontal axis representing MFCC mean values and the vertical axis representing density.
